message:
feat(wills-estate/viz): additional chart helpers / wiring updates for DeliverablesTreeViz + supporting visualizations

Substantial (+161 lines) additional content on the wills-estate
visualizations module. Continues the DeliverablesTreeViz surface
fleshing out from the previous commit (skill-catalog href,
`summarizeDeliverableModes` helper), and adds companion rendering
helpers and data shapes for the remaining charts in the article.

Left deliberately terse for the summary — the file diff is the
authoritative source; it's content additions only, with no public
API changes beyond the previous commit's `DELIVERABLE_SKILL_CATALOG_HREF`
and `summarizeDeliverableModes` exports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
